raw_consumer_statement: I went in a jewelry store in XXXX XXXX to buy my fianc a birthday present on XX/XX/year>. I bought a necklace and bracelet. I spent {$550.00}. That same day they fell apart. I went in the next day to get a refund and they said store credit only. So I got XXXX bracelets and then the same day they broke. After some research, we discovered these bracelets were not {$550.00}. Theyre, at most, between $ XXXX {$50.00}. The company had failed to deliver services. I contacted my credit company on XX/XX/year> to let them know that Ive basically been scammed. They asked for proof so I provided some photos and the receipt via fax. They wanted me to discuss this with the vendor and I had to explain that I did and that theyre in XXXX XXXX They provided me a case number but I didnt receive any email confirmation or any notification that the charge was in dispute.
